# Pantry Index

Last updated: 2026-05-14

Scratch storage for fragments, snippets, quotes, source texts, and gathered
research. Nothing in here gets compiled into the book. Move material into
`chapters/` when ready to use it.

---

## Research notes (generated by Chapter Research Gatherer, 2026-05-14)

| File | Chapter | Description |
|------|---------|-------------|
| `00-how-to-use-the-simulations_notes.md` | Ch 00 | Brutalist apparatus (CLAUDE.md/DESIGN.md/PROJECT.md) + free-particle Gaussian wave packet as first sim; PhET pedagogy literature |
| `01-the-wave-function_notes.md` | Ch 01 | ψ as probability amplitude, Born rule, probability current derivation, single-system vs. ensemble |
| `02-the-time-independent-schrodinger-equation_notes.md` | Ch 02 | TIS Hψ=Eψ, stationary states, infinite square well; quantization-from-continuity derivation |
| `03-the-harmonic-oscillator_notes.md` | Ch 03 | Ladder operators + analytic Hermite method; coherent states as non-spreading Gaussians |
| `04-formalism-dirac-notation-and-operators_notes.md` | Ch 04 | Hilbert space, bras/kets, Hermitian operators, Robertson uncertainty, Bloch sphere as visualizer |
| `05-quantum-mechanics-in-three-dimensions_notes.md` | Ch 05 | Central potentials, separation of variables, spherical harmonics, radial equation with effective potential |
| `06-spin_notes.md` | Ch 06 | Stern-Gerlach, Pauli matrices, Bloch sphere, Larmor precession (ω_L = γB) with concrete clinical numbers |
| `07-the-hydrogen-atom_notes.md` | Ch 07 | 1s ansatz derivation, r_mp ≠ ⟨r⟩, Rydberg series; 3D orbital visualizer |
| `08-identical-particles_notes.md` | Ch 08 | Exchange symmetry, Slater determinant, helium singlet-triplet splitting from antisymmetry, periodic table |
| `09-time-independent-perturbation-theory_notes.md` | Ch 09 | First/second-order energy, degenerate PT; Stark splitting of n=2 hydrogen; anharmonic-oscillator divergence demo |
| `10-time-dependent-perturbation-theory-and-transitions_notes.md` | Ch 10 | Interaction picture, Fermi's golden rule (Dirac 1927 origin, not Fermi), Rabi oscillations as pedagogical sweet spot |
| `11-the-wkb-approximation-and-tunneling_notes.md` | Ch 11 | WKB ansatz, Gamow alpha decay reproducing Geiger-Nuttall, Crank-Nicolson wave-packet tunneling animation |
| `12-entanglement-and-quantum-information_notes.md` | Ch 12 | Bell states, full CHSH derivation, optimal angles giving S=2√2, Aspect/Clauser/Zeilinger Nobel 2022 |
| `13-capstone-quantum-mechanics-in-research_notes.md` | Ch 13 | Five-direction capstone (decoherence/QC/QI/topology/many-body); Lindblad → Bloch equations as signature deep-dive |

## Library files (copied from shared MD library, 2026-05-14)

| File | Relevant to | Notes |
|------|------------|-------|
| `_lib_QM-Into-the-Light-Beginners.md` | All chapters | Pop-sci QM book — comparison material |
| `_lib_Penrose-Emperors-New-Mind.md` | Ch 04, 12, 13 | Penrose on consciousness + quantum measurement (minority view; useful as a contested data point) |
| `_lib_Davies-Demon-in-the-Machine.md` | Ch 08, 12, 13 | Paul Davies on information physics; relevant for the modern-connections capstone |
| `_lib_Significant-Figures-Stewart.md` | Ch 01, 04, 06 | Ian Stewart on mathematicians — biographical sidebars (Schrödinger, Dirac, Heisenberg) |
| `_lib_Nielsen-Reinventing-Discovery.md` | Ch 12, 13 | Michael Nielsen (canonical quantum-computing textbook co-author) — load-bearing for Ch 12 entanglement |
| `_lib_The-Blind-Spot.md` | Ch 04, 13 | Science / observer / experience — measurement and interpretation context |

## Source texts (pre-existing — NOT touched by this run)

| `290663862-A-First-Book-of-Quantum-Field-Theory-Lahiri-Pal.txt` | Graduate QFT — mostly out of scope; relevant for Ch 03 ladder operators → photon creation/annihilation extension |
